name: Home Visit
description: Teacher visits the student's home to discuss attendance and barriers to school with parents.

name: Counselling Session
description: One-on-one session with a school counsellor or mentor to address academic or personal issues.
expected_impact: Stabilization of grades and improved classroom focus

name: Scholarship Application
description: Assisting the family in applying for available government or community scholarships.
expected_impact: Reduced financial stress and improved long-term persistence

name: Peer Buddy Assignment
description: Pairing the student with a successful 'Successful Student' mentor for academic and social support.
expected_impact: Improvement in social belonging and mid-day meal participation

name: Parent Meeting
description: Formal meeting at school to discuss student progress and specific risk factors.
expected_impact: Increased parental awareness and active monitoring at home

name: Academic Support Program
description: Extra remedial classes or tutoring after school hours.
